subcodes.first_line: O fruit of the blessed Tree! Every gold and silver, ere the touchstone of trial and test, appeareth fair and lustrous and resplendent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثمره شجره مبارکه هر زر و سیمی پیش از محک و امتحان خوشرنگ و لطیف و براق و
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement
